data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. [src/components/settings-sheet.tsx:115] saves settings directly and only updates local sheet state; it never invalidates or updates the shared ['settings'] React Query cache. 2. [src/app/beats/page.tsx:123] derives maxConcurrentSessions from that cached query and [src/app/beats/page.tsx:361] uses it for queue/launch decisions. After saving a new limit, the backend enforcement changes immediately, but the beats page can continue using the stale limit until refetch or reload. User-visible result: lowering the limit can launch too many start attempts instead of queueing them, and raising it can keep queueing unnecessarily. Focused validation rerun in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-5fc1: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/settings.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-max-sessions.test.ts passed; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run lint passed with pre-existing warnings only. No test covers cache refresh between settings save and beats-page scheduling.
